hypothesis: If pre-trained single-gas neural networks are frozen and used to extract features that are concatenated with gas fractions and processed by a two-node GraphSAGE model, then this architecture will predict radial etch-rate profiles for Ar/O2 mixtures more accurately and generalize better to withheld high-power/pressure and low-Ar-fraction conditions than a standard feedforward neural network or alternative GCN/GAT architectures.
